channel.title: Dip on Bell Favorite Recipes
channel.description: Recent content in Dip on Bell Favorite Recipes

item.title: Yummy Dip
item.description:
Submitted by Francine Massicotte

Cousin of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 1-8 oz pkg of cream cheese

  • 1 cup sour cream

  • ½ cup mayonnaise

  • 1 cup seafood sauce

  • 2 cups shrimp (optional)

  • ½ cup diced green onions

  • ½ cup diced tomatoes

  • ½ cup green peppers

  • 2 cups grated mozzarella and/or cheddar cheese

Instructions

Mix the first 3 ingredients together and spread it on a pizza pan or large plate. Spread seafood sauce on top and add shrimp (optional). Cover with cheese. Sprinkle with green onions, tomatoes and green peppers.

item.title: Vegetable/Chip Dip
item.description:
Submitted by Brenda and Denis Arsenault

Cousins of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 1 cup sour cream
  • 1 cup Hellman’s mayonnaise
  • 1 tsp beau monde spice
  • 1 tsp minced onion
  • 1 tsp accent
  • 1 tsp dill weed
  • 1 tsp parsley
  • ½ tsp garlic salt
  • 2 to 3 drops of Tabasco

Instructions

Mix all ingredients together and serve with vegetables or chips.

item.title: Taco Dip
item.description:
Submitted by Diana Bell

Cousin of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 pkg of cream cheese
  • 1 envelope of taco seasoning
  • 1 jar of salsa
  • 1 medium tomato, diced
  • 1 can black olives, optional
  • 1 small pkg of shredded cheddar cheese
  • 1 small container of sour cream

Instructions

Blend cream cheese and taco seasoning. Spread on baking dish. Layer on sour cream and salsa. Top with diced tomato and black olives. Sprinkle cheddar cheese on top.

item.title: Nacho Dip
item.description:
Submitted by Kathy Genore and Paul Hamilton

Cousin of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 1 package Philadelphia cream cheese
  • 2 tbsp mayonnaise
  • 1 small jar salsa
  • 2 green onions, finely chopped
  • 1 tomato, finely chopped
  • approximately 2 cups finely grated cheddar cheese (marble
  • works well)

Instructions

Cream Philly and mayonnaise together, spread over bottom of dish, not quite to the edges. Pour salsa over cream cheese mixture. Sprinkle chopped green onions and tomato over salsa. Cover with grated cheddar cheese.

item.title: Mexi-Dip
item.description:
Submitted by Margot Bell and Darryl Fleguel

Sister and Brother-in-law of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 500 mL sour cream
  • 1 pkg taco seasoning mix
  • 1 tomato, diced
  • shredded lettuce
  • 1-2 green onions, chopped
  • ½ lb grated cheddar cheese

Instructions

Layer:

Mix sour cream with taco seasoning mix. On top of sour cream mixture, add cheese, lettuce, diced tomato, and onions.

Serve with taco chips. Easyandyummy!

item.title: Hot Crab Dip
item.description:
Submitted by Mary and John Willemsen

Friends of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 1/2 cup milk
  • 1/3 cup salsa
  • 3-8 oz packages of cream cheese, cubed
  • 2-8 oz packages of mock crab, flaked
  • 1 cup thinly sliced green onions
  • 1-4 oz can of chopped green chillies
  • assorted crackers

Instructions

Combine milk and salsa in a bowl. Transfer to a slow cooker coated with non-stick cooking spray. Stir in cream cheese, crab, onions and chillies. Cover and cook on low for 3-4 hours, stirring every 30 minutes. Serve with crackers. Yields 5 cups.

item.title: Guacamole Dip
item.description:
Submitted by Margot Bell and Darryl Fleguel

Sister and Brother-in-law of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 2 ripe avocados, peeled and mashed
  • 2 tbsp lemon juice
  • 2 tsp onion flakes
  • 1 tsp salt (optional)
  • ¼ tsp cayenne pepper
  • ¼ tsp pepper
  • ¼ tsp garlic powder
  • 1 ripe tomato, diced

Instructions

Mix all ingredients together. Serve with corn chips, tortilla chips or fresh, raw veggies. Makes about 1 cup.

item.title: Shrimp Dippers
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 14 fresh snow pea pods, trimmed
  • 28 large cooked, peeled, and deveined shrimp

Instructions

Arrange pea pods in a vegetable steamer over boiling water. Cover and steam 1 minute or until crisp-tender. Remove pea pods and chill.

Separate pea pods lengthwise into 2 pieces. Wrap a pea pod half around each shrimp and secure with a pick.

Yield: 28 appetizers.

Diabetic Exchange: Free. Calories 7, Carbohydrate 0.1 g, Protein 1.4 g, Fat 0.1 g, Cholesterol 12 mg, Fiber 0 g, Sodium 14 mg.

item.title: Dip'n Chicken
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 250 gr tub spreadable cream cheese
  • ½ to ¾ cup sour cream
  • 1 cup salsa
  • 1-1/2 cups grated Cheddar cheese
  • 1 cup cubed cooked chicken (use left-over chicken or grill up a chicken breast)
  • 1 bag bite-size Nacho chips

Instructions

Preheat oven of 350 degrees. Blend cream cheese with sour cream until mixture is spreadable. Spread mixture into a 6-cup oven-safe serving dish.

Spread salsa over mixture, using enough salsa to cover evenly. Arrange chicken, then the cheese evenly over salsa.

item.title: Dilled Garden Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 (16 oz) carton 1% low-fat cottage cheese
  • ½ tsp dried dillweed
  • 2 Tbsp tarragon vinegar
  • 1 Tbsp skim milk
  • 1 Tbsp finely chopped green onions
  • Dash of coarsely ground pepper
  • 1 Tbsp dried parsley flakes
  • Fresh parsley sprigs (optional)

Instructions

Place cottage cheese and vinegar in container of an electric blender or food processor; cover and process until smooth. Combine cottage cheese mixture, green onions, and next 4 ingredients in a medium bowl; stir well. Transfer cheese mixture to a small serving bowl; cover and chill. If desired, garnish with parsley sprigs and serve with Shrimp Dippers.

item.title: Spinach Bread Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 10-oz pkg spinach
  • 1 cup mayonnaise
  • 1 cup sour cream
  • 1 pkg dry Knorr vegetable soup mix
  • 2 green onions
  • 1 small can water chestnuts

Instructions

Cook spinach just lightly; drain and chop. Chop onions and water chestnuts. Mix all ingredients together and serve with small pieces of bread.

NOTE: You can use a large round load of pumpernickel bread. Cut bread from the center and use this to serve your dip. The bread taken from the center is used as small pieces to dip.

item.title: Shrimp Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 cup (250 gr) sour cream
  • 4 oz cream cheese, softened
  • 1 tsp onion salt
  • 1 tsp horseradish
  • ½ tsp Worcestershire sauce
  • 1 tsp lemon juice
  • 1 tbsp ketchup
  • 4 oz shrimp, chopped

Instructions

Combine and mix all ingredients except shrimp until blended. Add shrimp. Refrigerate. Serve with crackers and/or sliced vegetables.

item.title: Salsa Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 500 ml sour cream
  • 440 gram jar salsa
  • shredded medium cheese
  • chopped fresh tomatoes
  • chopped mild onions
  • chopped lettuce

Instructions

Layer cheese/sour cream/salsa mix, chopped tomatoes, chopped onions and chopped lettuce. Top with more grated cheese.

Makes 2 12”round dishes. (My low green Pyrex dish) (BB - Left this in because it made me laugh. I’m guessing we don’t have that “low green Pyrex dish” anymore?)

item.title: Pumpernickel Spinach Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Pumpernickel
  • 1 300 gr pkg of Chopped Spinach
  • 1 40-gr Knorr Vegetable Soup Mix
  • 1 500 mL tub of Sour Cream

Instructions

Defrost chopped spinach & squeeze out excess water.

Hollow out center of pumpernickel.

Cut center of pumpernickel into cubes or slices. In a small bowl combine sour cream soup mix and spinach.

Stir until thoroughly mixed. Place in center of pumpernickel

Refrigerate for 1 hour

Include bagels as an option for dipping.

item.title: Loney's Express Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 cups sour cream (500 ml)
  • 1 pouch Loney’s Onion Soup Mix
  • 2 Tbsp green pepper, finely chopped
  • ½ tsp Tabasco spicy sauce
  • 2 tsp tomato ketchup
  • ½ tsp chili powder

Instructions

In a medium-sized bowl mix Loney’s Onion Soup Mix with sour cream. Add remaining ingredients and mix thoroughly. Serve immediately with an assortment of raw vegetables.

For a Mexican-style dip, use twice the amount of spicy sauce. Serve with tortilla chips.

item.title: Hidden Valley Bacon & Cheddar Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 (1-oz) packet Original Ranch Party Dip
  • 1 pint sour cream
  • 1/4 cup bacon bits
  • 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese

Instructions

Mix Ranch Party Dip with sour cream.

Add bacon bits and shredded cheddar cheese.

Mix and serve.

item.title: Exquisite Crab Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 8-oz pkg cream cheese
  • 1 can (6 oz) crabmeat
  • 1 tsp horseradish
  • 1 tsp milk
  • 1 tsp minced onion

Instructions

Combine all ingredients. Serve cold or bake for 20 minutes at 350 degrees. Serve with cocktail rye bread.

item.title: Colette's Crab Meat Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 7-oz tin crab meat
  • 1 pkg. (250 gr) cream cheese
  • 1 tsp lemon juice
  • Sprinkling of parsley

Instructions

Mix all ingredients. Seafood sauce on top for flavor and color (optional)

item.title: Colette's Spinach Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 cup sour cream
  • 1 cup mayonnaise
  • 1 pkg frozen chopped spinach
  • 1 pkg Knorr vegetable soup mix

Instructions

Drain spinach well, then mix all ingredients together. If desired, put dip into pumpernickel bread.

item.title: Buffalo Chicken Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 chicken breast
  • 1 brick of cream cheese, softened
  • 1/2 cup of ranch dressing
  • 1/2 cup (or more) of Franks Red Hot
  • 1 cup cheddar cheese, shredded
  • Salt to taste

Instructions

  1. Season the chicken breast with salt, pepper, and chili flakes.  Bake in the oven or a pan.
  2. Shred the chicken and add the Frank’s Red Hot to it.  Mix it up.  (This can be left in the fridge overnight or can go to the next step right away).
  3. In a separate bowl, combine the cream cheese and ranch dressing.  Mix until mostly smooth.
  4. Add in the chicken/hot sauce mixture with a 1/2 cup of the cheddar cheese and mix till combined.
  5. Put the dip in a baking pan (8x8 works well) and cover with the remaining cheese.
  6. Bake at 350 for about 20 mins or until it starts bubbling.

item.title: Spinach Dip
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 lb fresh spinach
  • 1 Tbsp olive oil
  • 1/2 C. chicken broth
  • 1/2 C.sour cream
  • 1/2 C. mayonnaise
  • 8 oz cream cheese, cubed
  • 1 C. shredded mozzarella cheese
  • 1 tsp onion powder
  • 1/2 tsp salt, or more to taste
  • 1/4 tsp pepper, or more to taste

Instructions

Instructions

  1. In your Instant Pot, push saute, and combine the minced garlic and fresh spinach. Saute until the spinach is cooked down.
  2. Drain the excess liquid.
  3. Leave the garlic and spinach in the Instant Pot and add the chicken broth,sour cream, mayonnaise, cream cheese, mozzarella, and onion powder.
  4. Give it a big ‘stir" to combine.
  5. Add the lid on the Instant Pot and close the valve. Set the timer for 4 minutes on high (manual) pressure.
  6. Once the 4 minutes is done, do a quick release and add your salt & pepper - or more as necessary.
  7. Pour the spinach dip into a bowl to serve immediately.

Notes
